caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Elevated Seas Impact Grand Cayman Today
caribbean.paragraph: Grand Cayman is experiencing strong tropical moisture with sustained winds near 16 kt and wave heights reaching 7.1 ft from the southeast swell direction. Rain probability is 100%, creating hazardous marine conditions while Roatan sees gustier winds up to 23 kt with less intense rainfall.

mediterranean.headline: Calm Winds and Moderate Swells Across Western Mediterranean
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing light winds up to 12 kt with wave heights reaching 4.5 ft and a dominant WNW swell period of 10 seconds. Rain chances remain minimal with less than 10% rain probability while Cadiz sees slightly higher winds at 14 kt, maintaining stable marine conditions throughout the region.
